chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 116 – Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Husayn Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (366/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (366/ 5)
text: لَمَّا نَزَلَ النَّصْرُ عَلَى الْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ حَتَّى كَانَ بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ ثُمَّ خُيِّرَ النَّصْرَ أَوْ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ فَاخْتَارَ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Abdul Malik Bin Ayn,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When the helpers descended unto Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> until they were between the sky and the earth, then he<sup>asws</sup> was Given the choice, then help or meeting Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. So he<sup>asws</sup> chose meeting Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from in in a marfu‘ manner from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following about the words of Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most gracious. “. . Then he looked at the stars [37:88] and said, “I am sick!” [37:89]. The Imam (a.s.) said, “He calculated and found what had t happen to al-Husayn (a.s.) then he said, “I am sick for what will happen to al-Husayn (a.s.).”
